full_text:
Li Jue (Zhiran) 李傕 (稚然)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Jue (李傕), styledZhiran (稚然), was born in Beidi. Served Dong Zhuo. Later took control of the imperial court with Guo Si. Li Jue was affiliated with Dong Zhuo and Niu Fu. Li Jue lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
